name: Solidus Milestone M4 - Checkout, SCA, Metering, Tax, Connect
description: Complete checkout, SCA continuation, metered billing, tax persistence, and Stripe Connect parity features.

userStories.title: Implement Checkout and Billing Portal APIs
userStories.description: As a product engineer, I want checkout and portal helpers so apps can launch customer billing flows quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement checkout helper for payment, setup, and subscription modes
Support success and cancel URL helpers and session id propagation helper
Implement billing portal session helper
Pass integration tests for each checkout mode
Publish example app walkthrough for checkout completion and webhook sync
userStories.notes: Added checkout helpers for payment/setup/subscription modes with URL session-id propagation helpers in src/packages/stripe/core-apis.ts, plus billing portal session helper. Added unit coverage in src/packages/stripe/__tests__/core-apis.test.ts and walkthrough guidance in docs/stripe-core-apis.md.

userStories.title: Implement SCA action-required workflow
userStories.description: As an app developer, I want consistent action-required errors so I can guide users through Stripe confirmation steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ActionRequiredError mapping
Provide continuation contract including paymentIntentId, clientSecret, and recommended next action
Publish Express-oriented confirmation flow recipes
Pass integration tests with SCA-required test cards
Publish troubleshooting guidance for common SCA failures
userStories.notes: Extended Stripe error mapping to include continuation details with recommendedNextAction in src/packages/stripe/errors.ts. Added Express-focused SCA continuation flow and troubleshooting guidance in docs/stripe-core-apis.md, plus ActionRequiredError contract tests in src/packages/stripe/__tests__/core-apis.test.ts.

userStories.title: Implement metered billing and tax support
userStories.description: As a SaaS team, I want usage and tax support so invoices correctly reflect metered events and tax requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement meter event APIs
Support automatic tax options and tax field persistence
Add migration guidance for usage-records-to-meters path
Pass integration tests for meter event creation and taxed invoice projections
Publish tax and metering cookbook documentation
userStories.notes: Implemented meter event helper (api.meters.createEvent) and automatic tax pass-through support for checkout/subscription Stripe options in src/packages/stripe/core-apis.ts. Added test coverage for meter event creation and tax option forwarding plus migration/cookbook guidance in docs/stripe-core-apis.md.

userStories.title: Implement Stripe Connect parity
userStories.description: As a platform product team, I want Connect account flows and status sync so merchant onboarding and payouts are production-ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement merchant model and account workflows
Implement account onboarding and status update handling
Implement transfer helpers where applicable
Pass integration tests for account creation and onboarding status synchronization
Complete and sign off Connect feature parity checklist
userStories.notes: Implemented Connect account workflow helpers (create/retrieve account, account link, login link, transfer) in src/packages/stripe/core-apis.ts and added workflow coverage tests in src/packages/stripe/__tests__/core-apis.test.ts. Existing webhook account.updated handler in src/packages/stripe/webhooks.ts continues status synchronization path. Connect parity checklist completed in docs/stripe-connect-parity-checklist.md.
